bug_type: rule rewrites leave stale reverse dependencies behind
strategy_traps: Transitive invalidation can look correct while stale reverse edges still trigger the wrong recomputations
Removing all cache entries globally hides the correctness bug but breaks incremental behavior

prompt: Repair `DependencyCache` in `cache.py`. The cache tracks source values and derived nodes with dependencies. Updates must invalidate exactly the right downstream nodes, including transitive dependents, while keeping the reverse dependency graph consistent when rules change.
